forecastHoursEnabled_help: (Warning: Creates many data points! This can increase system load and memory usage.)
descriptionText_text: This adapter retrieves current weather data, Photovoltaic forecasts, as well as pollen and air quality data. Coordinates can be obtained at https://www.openstreetmap.org.
airQualityHint_text: Enable additional air quality data for this location.
direct1_label: Wind direction (where the wind is blowing to)
direct2_label: Wind origin (where the wind is coming from)
coordinates_help_label: Leave blank to use system latitude
fixed_rolling_help_label: If 'Rolling hours' is selected, the hourly forecast always shows the upcoming hours starting from the current hour. If 'Fixed hours' is selected, the hourly forecast shows fixed time intervals (e.g., 00:00-23:00) regardless of the current time.
minutes_15_help_label: If enabled, additional states for a 15-minute forecast (up to 24 hours for the current day) will be created. Please note that the availability of 15-minute data depends on the Open-Meteo API and may vary by location or time.
hours_json_label: Create JSON file for hourly forecast
hours_json_help_label: If enabled, a JSON file for the hourly forecast will be created for each location. (Forecast hours same as selected in forecast hour settings, but only fixed hours)
minutes_15_json_help_label: If enabled, a JSON file containing the 15-minute forecast will be created for each location.
location_help: Tip: Azimuth -180° = North, -90° = East, 0° = South, 90° = West, 180° = North. Tilt 0° = horizontal, 90° = vertical
_settingsHeader_sum_help: Settings for the sum of all locations. (Only adjustable if multiple locations are configured!)
locationsTotal_label: Create (Daily) peak sum of all locations
locationsTotal_help: If this option is enabled, additional states will be created that sum the values of all locations. This can be helpful if you have multiple locations and want to see the total forecast at a glance.
locationsTotal_hourly_label: Create (Hourly) peak sum of all locations
locationsTotal_minutely_label: Calculate (Every 15 minutes) peak sum of all locations
locationsTotal_minutely_json_label: Create (JSON every 15 minutes) peak sum of all locations
locationsTotal_hourly_json_label: Create (JSON Hourly) peak sum of all locations
locationsTotal_hourly_json_help_label: Depending on the setting, hours are recorded continuously or fixed.
windicon_help_where_label: South wind, The wind blows north, but the arrow points south where the wind is coming from.
windicon_help_from_where_label: South wind, The wind comes from the south, but the arrow points north where the wind is blowing.
pv_loc_info_label: Info: Location settings are only visible and editable when PV forecast is enabled.
extra_dbs_help: Enable extra data points in hours and 15-minute forecasts if needed.
